query: SELECT 'metas' as tabela, COUNT(*) as registros FROM metas WHERE corretorId IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE name LIKE 'Corretor%Teste%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Rank%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Batch%' OR name = 'Corretor 2' OR name LIKE '%test%' OR name LIKE 'João Silva Teste') UNION ALL SELECT 'conversion_stats', COUNT(*) FROM conversion_stats WHERE corretorId IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE name LIKE 'Corretor%Teste%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Rank%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Batch%' OR name = 'Corretor 2' OR name LIKE '%test%' OR name LIKE 'João Silva Teste') UNION ALL SELECT 'fila_distribuicao', COUNT(*) FROM fila_distribuicao WHERE corretorId IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE name LIKE 'Corretor%Teste%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Rank%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Batch%' OR name = 'Corretor 2' OR name LIKE '%test%' OR name LIKE 'João Silva Teste') UNION ALL SELECT 'atividades_diarias', COUNT(*) FROM atividades_diarias WHERE corretorId IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE name LIKE 'Corretor%Teste%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Rank%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Batch%' OR name = 'Corretor 2' OR name LIKE '%test%' OR name LIKE 'João Silva Teste') UNION ALL SELECT 'metas_diarias', COUNT(*) FROM metas_diarias WHERE corretorId IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE name LIKE 'Corretor%Teste%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Rank%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Batch%' OR name = 'Corretor 2' OR name LIKE '%test%' OR name LIKE 'João Silva Teste');
